ideal_customer_profile: Traditional businesses, agencies, e-commerce, real estate, logistics, or non-tech B2B companies that have repetitive manual processes.

scoring_rules.criteria: The company is a traditional business (e.g. real estate, logistics, marketing agency, e-commerce) that likely has high manual operational overhead and could benefit greatly from AI automation.
The company is a general B2B service provider or SaaS that is not specifically focused on AI or automation.
The company builds software tools for developers, but doesn't specialize in automation.
The company already builds workflow automation, AI agents, or API integration platforms (e.g. Zapier, Make, n8n, OpenAI). They will not buy our services.

buying_signals: Mentions of scaling operations or struggling with manual work
Focus on improving customer support or sales efficiency
Uses multiple different software tools that need connecting
